label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who Claire is dancing with at the end of the square dance. So, there are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them starts with a partner: Alice with Helga, Bob with Jamie, Claire with Ophelia, Dave with Karl, and Eve with Rodrigo. Now, throughout the song, there are several partner switches. Let me list them out step by step. The problem is to track Claire's partner after each switch and see who she ends up with. First switch: Eve and Bob switch partners. At the start, Eve is with Rodrigo, Bob is with Jamie. After they switch, Eve will be with Jamie and Bob will be with Rodrigo. Let me note down the new pairings: - Alice: Helga - Bob: Rodrigo - Claire: Ophelia - Dave: Karl - Eve: Jamie Second switch: Dave and Claire switch partners. Before this switch, Dave is with Karl, Claire is with Ophelia. After switching, Dave will be with Ophelia and Claire will be with Karl. Now the pairings are: - Alice: Helga - Bob: Rodrigo - Claire: Karl - Dave: Ophelia - Eve: Jamie Third switch: Claire and Bob switch partners. Claire is currently with Karl, Bob is with Rodrigo. After switching, Claire will be with Rodrigo, Bob will be with Karl. So now: - Alice: Helga - Bob: Karl - Claire: Rodrigo - Dave: Ophelia - Eve: Jamie Fourth switch: Dave and Alice switch partners. Dave is with Ophelia, Alice is with Helga. After switching, Dave will be with Helga, Alice will be with Ophelia. Updating the pairings: - Alice: Ophelia - Bob: Karl - Claire: Rodrigo - Dave: Helga - Eve: Jamie Fifth switch: Claire and Eve switch partners. Claire is with Rodrigo, Eve is with Jamie. After switching, Claire will be with Jamie, and Eve will be with Rodrigo. Final pairings: - Alice: Ophelia - Bob: Karl - Claire: Jamie - Dave: Helga - Eve: Rodrigo
